pilot_signal_strength.evidence: UDWDC-v2 fixes stability (CSI=0.987 on ImageNet); v1 #1 BEM on CIFAR-10; v2 rescues ImageNet (16% vs 6%); comprehensive pilot coverage across all 14 tasks

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H1 partial (3/5 fit, narrowed claim ok), H5 partially rescued (ResNet-101 Spearman=-0.785), H6 NOT supported, H7 PASS, H3 partial

path_to_full_result.evidence: Complete codebase with 14 tasks all piloted; UDWDC-v2 implemented and verified (9/9 tests); ImageNet pipeline validated with DDP; pure execution path remaining

novelty.evidence: Novelty 7/10; PID unification genuinely novel; 0 exact collisions; BEM/CSI/AIS metrics novel; dense but navigable related work landscape

resource_efficiency.evidence: ~124 GPU-hours on 8x RTX PRO 6000; all infrastructure built; incremental cost is execution only

path_to_full_result.evidence: No codebase, no infrastructure; SVD overhead at ImageNet scale; 2+ weeks to rebuild

novelty.evidence: Novelty 8/10; fewer close prior works; RG flow derivation genuinely novel

resource_efficiency.evidence: Starting from scratch; SVD per step prohibitively expensive at ImageNet scale

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: H7 passes; H6 NOT supported (alpha_bar worse than delta_max in LOO-CV); AIS uninformative (Spearman p=0.44)

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H6 falsified in pilot; core question anticipated by GWA (NeurIPS 2025); standalone paper substantially weakened

path_to_full_result.evidence: Shares infrastructure with cand_udwdc; minimal incremental cost

resource_efficiency.evidence: Low incremental cost beyond cand_udwdc experiments

H1_unification.detail: 3/5 methods fit (CPR 14.9%, Defazio 0.2%, NoWD 0.0%); CWD 25.6% and SWD 40.7% fail. Narrowed to 3-tier taxonomy claim.

H2_prescriptive_target.detail: UDWDC competitive on CIFAR-10; UDWDC-v2 rescues ImageNet stability (16% vs 6% v1); 90-epoch results needed for conclusive test

H3_batchsize_alignment.detail: CWD wins at bs=64 (+3.67% vs +2.51%), UDWDC-v2 wins at bs=512 (+0.28% vs -0.44%); crossover not clean but directionally consistent

H4_budget_efficiency.detail: UDWDC #1 BEM on CIFAR-10 (55.87); but FixedWD at lambda=5e-4 beats all dynamic methods on 2-epoch ImageNet. Full 90-epoch needed.

H5_layer_fixedpoints.detail: ResNet-50 UDWDC passes (rho=-0.613), v2 fails (rho=-0.161). ResNet-101 v2 STRONG pass (rho=-0.785). ViT marginal pass (rho=-0.318). CV(r*) prediction wrong (2.36-3.49 vs predicted <0.15).

H6_alpha_bar_prediction.detail: LOO-CV R^2: alpha_bar=-0.235 vs delta_max=-0.215. alpha_bar is slightly WORSE. lr alone (R^2=-0.099) is the best predictor. 54-run full experiment may change this.

H7_temporal_gate.detail: 12.1% above R^2=0.85 (threshold: 70%). Confirmed: alignment carries genuine geometric information beyond time proxy.

narrow_h1_claim.detail: 3-tier taxonomy framing ready; task plan uses this framing

fix_udwdc_stability.detail: UDWDC-v2 implemented, 9/9 tests pass, CSI=0.987 on ImageNet, zero-budget bug eliminated

drop_or_refine_h5.detail: ResNet-101 reversal rescues H5; scope to architecture-dependent claim

simplify_algorithm.detail: Both v1 and v2 included in full experiments; ablation will clarify K_p vs K_d dominance

reasons: UDWDC-v2 stability fix is completed and verified (9/9 tests, CSI=0.987) -- this was the #1 blocking concern
H5 partially rescued: ResNet-101 now shows strong anti-correlation (Spearman=-0.785), reversing prior falsification
Infrastructure is fully mature: 14 tasks piloted, UDWDC-v2 integrated, ImageNet DDP pipeline validated
Research focus is FOCUSED mode: front-runner has been refined once and earned advancement
Remaining uncertainties (H4 budget confound, H6 prediction, ablation K_p vs K_d) can ONLY be resolved by full training -- further piloting adds no information
Core novel contributions intact: PID unification (3-tier), BEM/CSI/AIS metrics, UDWDC-v2 algorithm, comprehensive fair comparison
next_actions: Execute 14-task experiment plan starting with diagnostic_cifar10 (Phase 1)
Include both UDWDC (v1) and UDWDC-v2 in ALL experiments for comparison
Frame H5 as architecture-dependent with ResNet as exemplar
Present H6 honestly regardless of outcome in 54-run full experiment
Monitor imagenet_main as make-or-break experiment: UDWDC-v2 must be competitive with CWD/FixedWD at 90 epochs
Use imagenet_budget_matched to isolate budget confound (critical for H4)
